strengths: Clearly identifies three distinct objects and provides real-world contexts for each (smartphone, Anne Frankâs diary, family tea set).
Consistently links each object to the chosen IA prompt (âinteraction with other knowersâ), moving beyond mere description.
Integrates AOK references (natural and human sciences, indigenous knowledge) to support the TOK commentary.
Demonstrates awareness of ethical and cultural dimensions (testimony, tacit knowledge) in the justification of objects.
weaknesses: Explanations often remain broad or generic, lacking the precision and depth required for higher bands.
Evidence is thin: generic stock images, incomplete provenance details and citation formatting weaken credibility.
Analysis of key concepts (filter bubbles, collective memory) is superficial and occasionally unfocused.
Intermittent explicit reference to the exact IA-prompt wording and incomplete concluding summary reduce cohesion.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs band-5 judgment reflects a solid exhibition that meets the 5â6 descriptors: three objects are clearly named with real-world contexts and linked to the IA prompt, and most points are supported by TOK concepts and occasional evidence. However, the commentary lacks consistent precision, robust evidence (images and citations), and depth of analysis. These limitations prevent it from reaching the well-explained, strongly evidenced standard of bands 7â8. A score of 5 accurately balances the submissionâs clear strengths with its uneven support and analysis.

annotations.comment: The title clearly identifies the TOK exhibition and the chosen IA prompt, providing a focused starting point for the submission.
The research question restates the IA prompt but could benefit from an explicit link back to the chosen wording throughout the commentary to maintain focus.
The introduction effectively outlines the three objects and situates the exhibitionâs focus on interaction with knowers, giving a clear roadmap.
The real-world context for the smartphone could be more precise: specify model, acquisition date or personal usage to strengthen authenticity.
The image of the smartphone appears generic. A personal photograph with identifiable features would better demonstrate the specific artifact.
To deepen analysis, include a direct quotation from Anne Frankâs text and explain how it illustrates interaction with knowers.
The description of smartphone functionalities is descriptive but needs explicit linkage to the IA prompt wording about âinteractions with other knowers.â
Good integration of AOKs such as natural and human sciences when discussing peer review and collaboration online.
The discussion of filter bubbles is relevant but superficial; include a concrete example or data to illustrate the impact on knowledge exchange.
The diaryâs historical context is clearly stated, anchoring the artifact in a specific real-world situation.
The image of the diary lacks provenance; a photo of the actual edition used would strengthen the link to the real-world context.
The commentary emphasizes how Anne Frankâs perspective enriches collective knowledge, demonstrating a clear link to the prompt.
The discussion on collective memory is apt but should explicitly tie back to how interactions with knowers shape historical understanding.
The ethical dimension of testimony is well articulated, showing awareness of responsibilities in knowledge preservation.
The context for the tea set is vividly introduced, emphasizing cultural exchange and interpersonal interaction.
The photo of the tea set does not clearly identify provenance; include an image showing family context or heirloom history.
The conclusion heading is present, but the conclusion text on the next page continues; ensure it remains cohesive and fully developed.
Identifying the AoK of indigenous knowledge systems shows strong awareness of knowledge transmission across cultures.
The narrative on generational knowledge could be enhanced with a specific anecdote showing transmission of a skill.
The explanation of tacit knowledge is insightful and effectively links practice to social context.
The bibliography needs consistent citation formatting (e.g., APA or MLA) rather than raw URLs.
The concluding paragraph on this page is truncated; ensure the final lines fully summarize and tie back to the IA prompt.
The final wrap-up succinctly links each artifact to the prompt, demonstrating cohesive insight across objects.
The Anne Frank source URL lacks author and publication details; include full reference information for credibility.
The Google image URL is irrelevant for source justification; replace with a reliable citation or caption of who took the photo.
Citing an unofficial TOK exhibition website undermines academic rigor; rely on peer-reviewed or primary sources.
The textbook reference is too vague; include author, edition, publisher and page range for proper attribution.
Throughout the exhibition, ensure the wording of the IA prompt is explicitly referenced when discussing each artifactâs TOK implications.
Consider strengthening each objectâs justification by explicitly explaining why it is indispensable for exploring interactions with knowers.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
